widgets_values: ✅ Here you set your last frame of your video.
✅ Here you set your initial image (frame) of your video.
🎦 Here will be your final video result.

🎞️ The last frame of you final result.

This will always select the last run method, even if you selected multiple options! (Interpolation node > FLF2V node > i2v only)

The image will be saved on the same folder as your video.
You can start with this again to expand your video.
🎞️ The mini-meme will show up here.

nodes.title: Usage (basic)
widgets_values:
1. Download and select the models and checkpoints to use
2. Select models and files inside the settings and backend UI
3. Enable at the "Type" switch what Workflow type to use
4. Choose at the "VAE" switch what type of VAE processing to use
5. Select at the "Audio" switch what the audio source should be
6. (optional) Set any "Extra" feature you want to use
7. (optional) Enable "Latent" switch for 2x FPS
8. (optional) Enable any extra post processing you like
### Spacial settings
| Setting | Description |
|--------:|------------:|
| Headroom | Used by chunking. Set a multiplayer for available VRAM. |
| T2V dimensions | If T2V is used this will set the aspect and resolution of T2V output. |

nodes.title: ⚙️ Chunking Headroom
widgets_values:
Chunking is automatically calculated based on video length in seconds and the input resolution.

You can set the headroom based on your available VRAM for optimized chunking.

## Suggestion

| Headroom | VRAM |
|--------:|------------:|
| 1.0 | 24GB |
| 2.0 | 16GB |
| 3.0 | 12GB |
| 4.0 | 8GB |

nodes.title: Info
widgets_values:
# 🎬 Generation Modalities | Setting | Description | |--------:|------------:| |📝➡️🎥
TextToVideo | Create completely new videos from scratch using text prompts or optional audio input.| |🖼️➡️🎥
ImageToVideo | Animate static reference images using text prompts or optional audio input.| |🎥➡️🎥
VideoToVideo | Generates fully synchronized audio tracks, including immersive ambience and speech with precise lip synchronization, driven by video visuals alongside text prompts or optional audio input.| ## Audio Input Settings | Setting | Description | |--------:|------------:| |🗣️ Model Audio | No external audio file used. The AI generates completely new audio based on your text prompt.| |🔊 Audio Input | Upload an existing voice or music file to drive the animation (e.g., for lip-sync).| |🎶 Video Audio | Audio from an input video will be used.| --- ## 🚀 VRAM optimization, long videos, spacial options - ⚙️ Chunking settings for longer videos, chunks will be automatically calculated based on frame-count/length. - ⛓️‍💥 Tiled VAE may reduce VRAM usage significantly, but also increases generation times a lot and can introduce artifacts. - 🎞️ When "2x FPS" is active, the latent upscaling process takes ~2.5x longer. - 🎞️ "2x Resolution" is **always** active, it will latent upscale the video to its original image input resolution, otherwise the output would be 0.5 of the image input. 💡 The input image or video only determines the aspect ratio of the output. The final resolution is scaled up or down to the selected megapixel value in the Resize Image node, which can be switched to scale by multiplier (1×) to keep the original resolution.

nodes.title: V2V Usage
widgets_values:
1. Short description of your loaded video
2. "the video continues with"
3. full description of the action you want to add

🕘 The full duration is calculated on the set seconds as expansion to the initial video (initial video duration + set seconds).

OR
[ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors) ### Model Storage Location ``` 📂 ComfyUI/ ├── 📂 models/ │ ├── 📂 unet/ │ │ └── ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_transformer_only_fp8_scaled.safetensors │ ├── 📂 vae/ │ │ └── LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors │ │ └── LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors │ │ └── taeltx2_3.safetensors │ ├───📂 text_encoders/ │ │ └── gemma_3_12B_it_heretic_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors │ │ └── ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors │ ├───📂 latent_upscale_models/ │ │ └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors │ │ └── ltx-2.3-temporal-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors │ ├───📂 loras │ │ ├── 📂 LTX │ │ │ └── ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-*.safetensors ```

nodes.title: Resolution Note
widgets_values:
### Automatic scaling and resolution calculation The initial image will be scaled using optimized math targeting the **Wan 2.2 / LTX 2.3 VAE (32x32 block)** resolution. Aspect ratios are calculated automatically using the square-root area method, snapping the video resolution to the nearest 32-pixel boundary to prevent VAE edge artifacts. Markdown ### OmniForge: Professional Scaling & High-Resolution Benchmarks The OmniForge workflow uses a specialized **Square-Root Area scaling** targeting the **LTX 2.3 VAE (32x32 block)**. This ensures that regardless of the aspect ratio (1:1, 9:16, 21:9, etc.), the total pixel "budget" remains consistent to protect VRAM. All dimensions are snapped to the nearest 32-pixel boundary to ensure a perfect fit for the Latent-to-Video patches. | Stage | Target MP | Quality Label | 16:9 Res (Div32) | |---:|:--- |:--- |:--- | | 1 | 0.52 | **Preview**
~ 544p | 960 x 544 | | 2 | 0.83 | **HD**
~ 720p | 1216 x 672 | | 3 | 2.10 | **FHD (1K)**
~ 1080p | 1920 x 1088 | | 4 | 3.30 | **QHD (1.5K)**
~ 1376p | 2432 x 1376 | | 5 | 4.75 | **Cinema (2K)**
~ 1632p | 2912 x 1632 | | 6 | 6.50 | **Pro (3K)**
~ 1920p | 3424 x 1920 | | 7 | 8.30 | **UHD (4K)**
~ 2160p | 3840 x 2176 | | 99 | no-scale | **Native** | Source Res |

nodes.title: Changelog
widgets_values:
## Requirements - [ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite](https://github.com/Kosinkadink/ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite) - [rgthree-comfy](https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy) - [Comfyui-WhiteRabbit](https://github.com/Artificial-Sweetener/comfyui-WhiteRabbit) - [ComfyUI-KJNodes](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) - [ComfyUI-Easy-Use](https://github.com/yolain/ComfyUI-Easy-Use) - [ffmpeg](https://www.ffmpeg.org/) - [Sage Attention](https://github.com/thu-ml/SageAttention) (optional) - [Upscaler model](https://openmodeldb.info/) (optional) - [LTX LoRAs](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2) (optional) - [Nvidia_RTX_Nodes_ComfyUI](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/Nvidia_RTX_Nodes_ComfyUI) --- ## Features - 🎥 **I2V, FLF2V, T2V, V2V** + Audio - 🤝 **Video resolution matching** - Fully automatic scaling - ⚙️ **Chunking** (Seconds/Frame based) - 🎞️ **LTX Latent Upscaler** (2x native latent) - 📚 **Prompt Enhancer** - Automatic prompt refinement - 🪫 **Low VRAM optimizations**
- ✨ **Multiple Resolution Upscalers** - Torchlanc (very fast, color correct, low VRAM) - Upscale with Model (additional detail, high quality) - RTX Super Resolution** (ultra fast, very accurate)
- 🔗 **VAE options** - Full VAE - Tiled VAE
- 🔊 **Multiple Audio options** - Text to Audio (Model audio) - Input audio file - Video audio
- 🫥 **Watermark** option - 📢 **Soundmark** option - 🧮 **Color match** feature - 👾 **MiniMeme** feature - Create small gif's - 🃏 **Last Frame Extraction** - 🔖 **Bookmark-Shortcuts** - with number keys --- ## Latest Changes / Fixes - V2V working - Audio for v2v

nodes.title: Positive prompt
widgets_values:
A cinematic video of a woman seated on a couch in a living room at night, wearing a fitted white sleeveless top, light gray leggings, and black high-heeled sandals.

Slowly, she uncrosses her legs. 
She says in Portuguese, “O que é que se está a passar comigo?” 
Her legs start to lengthen, followed by the rest of her body as she gradually grows taller.

She slowly rises to her feet. As she stands, her chest begins to expand, her white blouse stretching and parting slightly at the center, revealing deep cleavage and an ultra-slim waist that accentuates a toned, muscular abdomen (six-pack). Her shoulders broaden, and her arms become unrealistically muscular. Her legs also become more defined and muscular, while her gray leggings stretch and rip at the hips, knees, and calves.

She laughs and says in Portuguese “Estás tão pequenino!”

The camera moves into a low-angle shot, tilting upward to capture her full figure. She looks down at herself in amazement, her expression shifting from confusion to awe. She places her hands on her hips and takes a deep breath.

She says in portuguese “Olha para ti aí em baixo.”

She looks at the camera, then leans down onto her knees close to it, and finally laughs again. She says in portuguese “Não esperavas isto, pois não?” She squeezes her breasts and laughs.

a: Total Frames

b: Width

c: Height

d: VRAM Headroom (use 1.0 for 24GB, 2.0 for 16GB, 3.0 for 12 GB, 4.0 for 8 GB)

a = input resolution multiplayer
b = width
c = height

nodes.title: Resolution and frame count (automated)
widgets_values:
Width & height settings must be divisible by 32 + 1.
Frame count must be divisible by 8 + 1.
